comment: Authoritative list of every model file bundled into the packaged IronMic app. scripts/verify-models-manifest.js re-hashes each `path` at postbuild and fails the build on mismatch. CC-BY 4.0 entries also require THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md to carry an attribution block referencing this manifest entry.

models.purpose: Speaker embedding for remote-meeting loopback diarization (M2)
models.optionalReason: When missing, M2.5b runtime readiness check declines to flip meeting_diarization_mode to 'embedding'; meeting recorder falls back to legacy text-LLM diarization at stop.
